items.name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
items.description: Grilled sourdough bread topped with fresh tomatoes, basil, garlic, and extra virgin olive oil

items.name: Burrata e Prosciutto
items.description: Creamy burrata cheese with 24-month aged Parma ham, rocket, and balsamic glaze

items.name: Zuppa del Giorno
items.description: Chef's daily soup — ask your server for today's selection

items.name: Calamari Fritti
items.description: Crispy fried squid rings served with lemon aioli and fresh herbs

items.name: Tagliatelle al Ragù
items.description: Hand-rolled egg pasta with slow-cooked Bolognese ragù and Parmigiano Reggiano

items.name: Risotto ai Funghi Porcini
items.description: Creamy Carnaroli risotto with wild porcini mushrooms, white wine, and aged Parmesan

items.name: Branzino al Forno
items.description: Oven-roasted sea bass with caperberries, cherry tomatoes, olives, and grilled vegetables

items.name: Tagliata di Manzo
items.description: Sliced grilled sirloin steak with rocket, shaved Parmesan, and truffle oil

items.name: Gnocchi al Pomodoro e Basilico
items.description: Homemade potato gnocchi in a slow-cooked San Marzano tomato and basil sauce (vegan)

items.name: Tiramisù della Casa
items.description: Classic homemade tiramisù with Savoiardi biscuits, mascarpone, espresso, and Marsala

items.name: Panna Cotta al Caramello
items.description: Silky vanilla panna cotta with warm salted caramel sauce and toasted hazelnuts

items.name: Gelato Artigianale
items.description: Three scoops of house-made gelato — ask for today's flavours

items.name: Espresso
items.description: Single shot of our house-blend Italian espresso

items.name: Aperol Spritz
items.description: Aperol, Prosecco, a splash of soda, and a slice of orange

items.name: Vino della Casa
items.description: House wine — red, white, or rosé (175ml glass)
